name: ledger-sync
description: Production-ready data ingestion and reconciliation engine with modern web interface

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run python -m uvicorn ledger_sync.api.main:app --reload --reload-dir src --reload-include "*.py" --port 8000
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run python -m ruff check .
scripts.type-check:backend: cd backend && uv run python -m mypy src/
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && uv run python -m pytest tests/ -v
scripts.check: concurrently -n "lint,types,test" -c "bgYellow.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgGreen.bold" "pnpm run lint" "pnpm run type-check" "pnpm run test"
scripts.format:backend: cd backend && uv run python -m ruff format src/ tests/ && uv run python -m ruff check --fix src/ tests/

author: Sagar Gupta
